headline: International Paper Starts Brandon Plant As Valuation Gap Draws Attention
summary: International Paper has started construction on a new $225 million sustainable packaging facility in Brandon, Mississippi. The project has board approval and is part of the company’s broader modernization and growth plans. The facility is expected to support expanded sustainable packaging capacity and create new jobs in the region. For investors tracking NYSE:IP, this new plant comes as the stock trades around $31.29, with performance that has been mixed across timeframes. The share price...

headline: International Paper Breaks Ground on New Sustainable Packaging Facility in Rankin County, Mississippi
summary: Last week, International Paper (NYSE: IP; LSE: IPC) celebrated the groundbreaking of its new sustainable packaging facility in Rankin County, Mississippi, marking a major milestone in the company's strategic growth and long-term investment in the Mid-South region.
